title: Spaghetti Bolognese
description: A restoration of the legendary CR43Z33M0NK3Y's mods.
body:
This is a rewrite of the original code for the Spaghetti Bolognese mod created by [CR43Z33M0NK3Y](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/cr43z33m0nk3y/). Due to it being inactive since 2011, and due to several of my friends wanting the mod added to our server, I have gone to the effort of rewriting all the code to be compatible with 1.16.4. This will eventually expand to include a rewrite of all of their original mods.

To see which current mods are added to the remake, please check the source code readme.
